title: rosa × dumetorum f. urbica
intro: Rosa × dumetorum f. urbica, also known as the urban wild rose, is a variant of the Rosa × dumetorum, a hybrid of Rosa canina and Rosa rubiginosa. It is a shrub-like plant with fragrant flowers and is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The urban wild rose has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and boost the immune system, providing health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved wound healing. The herbal preparations of Rosa × dumetorum f. urbica include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
